# Supported Countries

Acme Shop provides international shipping to a wide range of countries, allowing customers worldwide to access their products. To confirm shipping eligibility, customers should refer to the "Shipping Destinations" section during checkout. Shipping fees, delivery times, and specific import restrictions vary by destination, and customers are responsible for any additional charges. The company also notes that international shipping may occasionally be suspended in certain areas due to logistical issues, and encourages customers to check the website or subscribe to updates.

[Source: international_shipping.md#supported-countries]
